name: Billy Byrd

contactInfo.office: 405 N. Titus St., Suite 300, Gilmer, TX 75644

bio: Billy Byrd serves as the District Attorney for Upshur County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Gilmer area. He is dedicated to upholding justice and ensuring public safety throughout Upshur County.
campaignPromises: Prosecute violent offenders to the fullest extent of the law
Target drug trafficking in Upshur County
Support victims throughout the criminal justice process
Run an efficient and transparent DA's office
Strengthen partnerships with law enforcement agencies
